data.title: Integrate test quality overlay into review workflow dispatch
data.description:
## Description
Wire the test quality overlay into the existing overlay dispatch infrastructure.

### Steps
1. Update plugins/dso/scripts/overlay-dispatch.sh to handle test_quality_overlay
2. Update plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4b to include test quality overlay
3. Update plugins/dso/hooks/resolve-overlay-findings.sh to accept test quality findings
4. Remove .test-index RED marker

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/overlay-dispatch.sh — Edit
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md — Edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/resolve-overlay-findings.sh — Edit
- .test-index — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Overlay dispatch handles test_quality_overlay
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality" plugins/dso/scripts/overlay-dispatch.sh
- [ ] Review workflow documents test quality overlay
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
